{{ $current := . }}
{{ $root := .Site.Home }} {{ $allItems := ($root.RegularPages | append $root.Sections).ByWeight }} {{ range $allItems }} {{ $id := substr (sha1 .Permalink) 0 8 }} {{ $isSection := .IsSection }} {{ $expand := or (eq $current .) (eq $current.FirstSection .) }} {{ if not .Page.Params.tocHidden }}
{{ if $isSection }}
{{ .Title }}
{{ else }}
{{ .Title }}
{{ end }} {{ if $isSection }}
{{ range .Pages.ByWeight }} {{ if not .Page.Params.tocHidden }}
{{.Title}}
{{ end }} {{ end }}
{{ end }}
{{ end }} {{ end }} {{ if not ($.Param "docs") }} {{ partialCached "sidebar/user-docs" . }} {{ end }}
